entry.title: 1H2025 - ILX search functionality

Will the "empty" library search, which displays all the courses in the library without input in the search field, be included in 1H25?

Thank you for your answer

entry.title: Re: CDS views to create an Extern API in SAP Public cloud...
entry.content:
Hello Narayan,

Can you please see if you can add the fields using Fiori custom fields logic by identifying the sales order header business context. Up on creation, you will have an option to check the related standard API's and CDS views given by SAP for the related business process. At least you can see the available data sources to consume. Hope this will help you.

Best regards

Robert

entry.title: Re: Tax on cash discount during payment F110
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

The behavior you are seeing - cash discount line items being split and tax calculated on both line items in the clearing document - is due to how the system handles cash discount and withholding tax calculations. Let’s analyze if this is expected and how to correct it if necessary.

 Why is this happening?

  1. Cash Discount & GST Handling:
    • In SAP, cash discounts can be taxable or non-taxable, depending on your country-specific tax configuration.
    • If GST is calculated on net value (after cash discount), SAP adjusts tax accordingly.
    • If GST is calculated on gross invoice value, then the cash discount shouldn’t impact GST.
  2. Withholding Tax Calculation in Clearing (F110)
    • Withholding tax is recalculated during invoice payment (especially if it’s payment-dependent WHT).
    • The system may split the cash discount into multiple lines, adjusting WHT calculations accordingly.
    • If withholding tax applies before cash discount, the tax base changes at the time of payment.
  3. Impact on Clearing Document
    • If SAP is splitting the cash discount into two line items and calculating tax separately, it’s likely because:
      • The cash discount tax configuration in tax procedure is set to apply GST separately.
      • There are multiple tax codes involved (GST + WHT).
      • Withholding tax is recalculated differently at payment compared to invoice posting.

 

Is this Expected Behavior?

Yes, this behavior is standard SAP functionality if your tax settings are configured this way. However, it can be adjusted based on business requirements.

 

How to Correct or Adjust It?

If you want to prevent SAP from splitting cash discount and recalculating tax, you have a few options:

1️. Check Your Tax Procedure Configuration:

  • Go to SPRO > Financial Accounting (New) > Financial Accounting Global Settings > Tax on Sales/Purchases > Basic Settings > Assign Tax Codes to Tax Procedures.
  • Check whether cash discount is affecting GST calculation.
  • If your country allows GST calculation on the original invoice amount (not after cash discount), update this configuration.

2️. Adjust Withholding Tax Settings:

  • Go to Withholding Tax Configuration (OBYZ or SSCUI settings in S/4HANA Cloud).
  • Check if WHT should be calculated before or after cash discount.
  • Change the withholding tax base amount settings if necessary.

3️. Modify Payment Program Settings (F110):

  • If necessary, adjust payment program parameters to prevent cash discount from affecting tax calculations.

4️. Check Business Process Compliance:

  • In some countries, it’s legally required to adjust tax based on the final payment amount.
  • Verify if your finance/legal team accepts this SAP behavior.

 

I hope this will help you answer your questions.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Neo Site Migration | Import a SuccessFactors design page in SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition
entry.content:
Hi everyone.

I have a NEO site which is based on page design from SuccessFactors and It looks like the image below.

 Other thing that I found is that there's a destination created for importing the custom pages, like the following.

 

Now I need to migrate this Neo site to BTP Foundry, but using "SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition" service. How can I do that?

Is it neccesary to have the "SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition" license?

Please your help. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: "Lost" G/L accounts between transports 3SL
entry.content:
Hello, I created G/L accounts in Manage GL Account master data application in Development tenant of the 3SL architecture (SAP S4H Public cloud). I transported it to Test tenant. When I check the Manage GL account MD application in Test, I don't see some of the accounts that I created in Development. But I see these accounts in development. 
The master data of the missing accounts are not blocked, they are in the P implementation status.. they have the same settings as the other successfully transported accounts. 

Do you know what the problem can be? Many thanks

entry.title: Re: Is it advisable to create all classic APIs for Tier 2...
entry.content:
Hi Ram,

I would recommend to create one wrapper class for all the API's which can refer to a separate controller class for each API and a model class for database updates.

Example:

ZCL_WRAPPER_LIST_OF_ALL_API - Main wrapper class

ZCL_API_CTRL - Controller class for each API where you can break down code into multiple methods 

ZCL_API_MODEL - model class where only database updates can be listed out

I have designed in a similar way for few projects. Hope you will understand my viewpoint here.

entry.title: Re: Why the second ZP document is being created with full...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, the ZP is used to process vendor payments. Based on your description, the first ZP document clears the vendor open item, but a second ZP document is generated, containing both a debit and credit for the full invoice amount, while still leaving a credit in the clearing account.

Possible Reasons for the Second ZP Document

1️. Bank Charges or Additional Fees Processing

  • The second ZP document may have been automatically generated to account for bank charges.
  • This happens when the system posts a separate line item for bank fees while keeping the full invoice amount in the payment transaction.
  • The credit remains in the clearing account if the bank charges weren’t fully offset.

2️. Incorrect Clearing Logic or Partial Clearing

  • The second ZP document could have been posted in an attempt to clear the first payment (ZP1) but didn't fully clear the clearing account.
  • If the payment program (F110) or manual clearing (F-53) was used improperly, this could result in an unbalanced clearing account.

3️. Reversal & Reposting of Payment

  • If there was a reversal (due to incorrect bank data or rejection by the bank), SAP might generate a second payment document (ZP2) to repost the correct transaction.
  • If the system doesn’t automatically clear everything, a credit could remain in the clearing account.

4️. Payment Medium Processing Issues

  • If a payment medium (e.g., SEPA, bank file) was generated incorrectly or modified, SAP may create an adjustment entry, resulting in the second ZP document.

 

I hope this will help you answer your questions.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Price approval
entry.content:
Hello 

  1. We maintain the margin percentage to calculate the price in the condition record. When the sales rep changes the percentage in the sales order/quote, how do we trigger the approval? Can I get an email notification for the approval? Are there configuration steps?

(https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/7b24a64d9d0941bda1afa753263d9e39/46f4119db1dc4826b6f8b3683264680e.html?q=SD PRICE CHANGE APPROVAL)

 

The  process mentioned above will not fit us.

2. We have upper and lower limit for the pricing condition records. When I change the price beyond that limit, it throws the error in the sales order/quote, how can I make it a warning rather than error and trigger the workflow & email.

SE91, should we change the message type from E to W?

Below are the available business processes in Fiori for Business Partner scenarios I can see. Check if this helps. If it allows you to add from here, you don't need any buttons to call the field.

entry.title: Re: "Lost" G/L accounts between transports 3SL
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (3SL architecture: DEV → TEST → PROD), when G/L accounts are not appearing in the Test tenant after transport, here are possible reasons and solutions:

1️. Transport Not Fully Completed

  • Even though the transport request was created, some objects may not have been included or may have encountered an issue during the import into TEST.
  • Check in "Export Software Collection" (in Development) and "Import Collection" (in Test) to see if the transport was fully applied.

2️. Missing Company Code-Specific Assignments

  • In SAP S/4HANA Cloud, G/L accounts are first created at the chart of accounts level, but they also need to be extended to specific company codes.
  • If the accounts exist in Test at the Chart of Accounts level but are missing in the company code, you need to manually assign them.

3️. Master Data vs. Configuration Issue

  • In the 3SL landscape, G/L account master data is not transported—only configuration is.
  • If the missing accounts were created directly as master data (instead of via SSCUI or configuration), they will not be transported to the Test system.

4️. Implementation Status Issue (P Status)

  • Even though the accounts show P – Active, some dependencies might not be fully transported (e.g., related tax settings, financial statement versions, etc.).
  • Check "Manage Your Solution" > Configuration Activities to see if any dependencies need manual activation.

5️. Transport Logs & Errors in Import Collection

  • Go to "Import Collection" in the Test system and review the transport log for any errors or missing dependencies.

 

I hope this will help you answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

Shane

entry.title: Graduate Student Programs for SAP Certification - Seeking Advice
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm currently pursuing my Master's in Information Systems and have about 5 years of experience as an ABAP Developer.

As I continue my academic journey, I'm looking to enhance my credentials with the SAP Certified Associate - Back-End Developer - ABAP Cloud  and SAP Fiori Application Developer certification. I'm specifically interested in:

  • Are there any special programs or discounts available for graduate students pursuing SAP certifications
  • Does SAP offer any university alliance programs that provide certification opportunities?
  • Has anyone here completed this certification while being a student? If so, what was your experience like?
  • Any recommendations on the best preparation resources for this certification that are budget-friendly for students?
  • Are there any mentorship programs available for students aiming to specialize in SAP development?

Additionally, if there are any specific grants, scholarships, or corporate sponsorship programs that support SAP certification for graduate students, I'd appreciate that information as well.

I believe this certification would strengthen my professional credentials and prior industry experience, making me more competitive in the job market as I advance my career in SAP development.

Thank you in advance for your insights and advice!

Best regards,
Kavyasri

entry.title: Re: API to update mass fields value for mass roles
entry.content:
There is no such API to mass change for business roles. 

Please kindly check the documents below as workarounds. 

  • How to Maintain Restrictions Using the Mass Change Wizard | SAP Help Portal
  • Identity and Access Management | SAP Help Portal >  Create Restricted Business Role

Now in my case I have done it by add some brackets. Just wondering if I have more complicated task in the future, how can I easily do it by Python code.

entry.title: 3F0 从SAP S/4HANA Cloud（公共版）2502版本开始支持结算科目
entry.content:
背景介绍

对于基于事件的生产成本过账 (3F0)，在先前版本中，非物料接收方类别（例如成本中心、WBS 要素和订单）的成本结算只能使用原始发货、活动确认和间接费用科目过账。

从2502版本起，您可以选择按结算科目作为非物料接收方科目确定方法，设置成本结算特定的总账科目。

前提条件

在使用此新功能之前，应在 SSCUI ID 103940 中为非物料接收方订单完成以下必要配置。

测试场景

以订单 1051263 为例，使用应用分析生产成本 - 基于事件

可以看到，已经维护过账规则将 100% 结算到成本中心 KSII_1

返回到订单详细信息屏幕，可以看到：基于事件的结算金额为 贷方交易金额为110（显示为负），等于汇总借方交易金额：作业确认 (100) 和间接费用 (10)。

结算总账科目为 92105300，而不是原始科目。

进一步的，在此新功能之前的版本，我们对比下已结算订单 2001061，默认功能只能选择按原始科目结算。

转到订单详细信息，我们可以看到结算使用的是原始科目。

总结

此新功能满足了使用结算总账科目的特定需求，也提供了更大的灵活性。

entry.title: Re: Without Qty Posting option not appearing

entry.title: Re: Process Order Not creating PMR in EWM 950
entry.content:
Hi @Dhood 

Please start looking into Master data, seems might be ssystem issue, check below link, PSA is determined correctly...

1. Create supply area (PK05)

2. Maintain control cycle (LPK1)

3. Assign supply area in the work center (CR02)

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/wm-material-staging-production-order/qaq-p/11671011

Also do uncheck manual release for your process order, lets fix the issue then.place auto release in place again.

Kind Regards,

Ajit

Lillian

entry.title: 【云领未来】SAP S/4HANA Cloud Product Expert Training 大中华区专场产品专家赋能集训营即将启动！
entry.content:
由SAP Product Experience Cloud ERP Product Success团队精心打造的公有云Product Expert Training大中华区专场即将重磅回归！这场为期七天的年度智慧盛宴，专为合作伙伴与客户团队设计，深度解析SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502版本核心升级与创新场景，助您抢占企业数字化转型的智高点。

智慧碰撞 实战赋能
在4月14日至4月22日的知识马拉松中，我们为您准备了14场硬核课程：从行业战略前瞻到端到端场景化方案，从SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502版本新特性到产品路线图深度解码。在这里与SAP公有云产品架构师实时互动，获取路线图一手解读。

价值解锁

  • ​战略与行业洞察：解读公有云ERP在大中华区的落地实践密码
  • 端到端场景化方案：基于2502版本的订单到现金、采购到支付等全流程沙盘演练
  • 跨领域赋能专题：AI助手Joule应用开发、可持续运营指标体系构建等前沿课题

参与方式

温馨提醒：建议提前完成注册并保存日程到您的日历，若遇技术问题请直接联系培训支持团队
✅ ​合作伙伴通道
参与SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition实施项目的伙伴，可通过赋能合作伙伴联系人直达分享注册链接及后续回放资源

✅ ​客户通道
拥有SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition的用户，可通过客户联系人直达分享注册链接及后续回放资源

✅ ​内部员工专享
点击日程部分链接"注册"完成注册

议程详情及报名通道如下：

 第一周 Week 1
周周一 Monday周二 Tuesday周三 Wednesday周周四 Thursday周周五 Friday
日期2025.4.142025.4.152025.4.16日期2025.4.17日期2025.4.18
主题日销售智能企业与用户体验财务与采购管理主题日制造与本地化主题日决策支持与跨技术集成
        
2:00 PM -2:45 PMSAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 销售SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud 2502 版本中的 AI功能介绍以及免费体验内置 AI 功能的限时促销信息 (Helen Han)采购计划协议2:30 PM -3:00 PM变更管理和物料清单管理 Change management and BOM management2:00 PM -3:00 PM跨技术话题 （Cross Technology Topics）
3:00 PM - 3:45 PM  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 财务新功能介绍3:30 PM - 4:30 PM台湾地区合规性 -
台湾VAT申报混税场景、电子发票方案混合税率		3:00 PM - 3:45 PM分析报表 & Process Navigator
4:00 PM - 5:00 PM  中国地区本地化方案：财税方案及合规报表增强 -
进项税/销项税/数电票、账龄报表及现金流量表、现金管理付款管理		    

 

 第二周 Week 2
周周一 Monday周周二 Tuesday周三 Wednesday周四 Thursday周五 Friday
日期2025.4.21日期2025.4.222025.4.232025.4.242025.4.25
主题日供应链、质量管理与仓储物流优化主题日供应链管理与制造优化   
  10:30AM-11:15AM运输管理 SAP Transportation Management   
2:00 PM -2:30 PM供应链管理+质量管理2:00 PM -2:45 PMSAP EPPM/ SPRM   
3:00 PM - 3:30 PM云仓库管理（Cloud WM）3:00 PM - 4:00 PM制造计划与执行，看板制造   

 

智慧资源宝库
探索GROW with SAP——以SAP S/4HANA Cloud为数字化核心引擎，我们提供从云端协同创新到智能化运营的全生命周期服务。点击阅读英文版链接解锁更多国际专家团队打造的数字化转型工具包。

entry.title: Re: Restrict the "Release" and "Pay" button in the App "M...
entry.content:
@Inchara_BK Thanks for your question.

At the moment there is no seperate authorizaiton control for these buttons in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. You may request this feature on the Customer Influence Portal. We continuously review and prioritize feature requests based on customer feedback. Thanks again for your feedback!

entry.title: How to display account descriptions for fixed assets when printing in the Accounts Document Output
entry.content:
How can the "Details" column display account descriptions instead of just the fixed asset numbers for fixed asset original value and accumulated depreciation accounts when printing?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to display account descriptions for fixed assets...
entry.content:
1. Open the form IDCN_ACC_DOC_OM_E.xdp using Adobe LiveCycle Designer. Double-click the cell where you want to add or modify the script to open the script editor.
    In this example, double-click the highlighted "Details" column in yellow; the upper half of the window will show the script editor.
  2. Modify the existing script code by adding the code highlighted in yellow. The goal is to display the account description in addition to the account number and asset number when the account type of the line item is a fixed asset.
    (In this example, only the form that displays in the company currency and is a non-alternative account is modified.)
  3. Save this form. 

Kindly refer to the KBA as reference:

3513087 - How to display account descriptions for fixed assets when printing in the Accounts Document Output app - SAP for Me

entry.title: 8 Baby Steps to Learn Joule - (Step #3) Joule Architecture
entry.content:
This blog is part of the series 8 Baby Steps to Learn Joule. Please check the previous blogs, before proceeding.

 #1 – Introduction to Joule

#2 How Joule Works

In this blog, we will dive deep into architecture of Joule.

 

Let’s first quickly recap what we learnt so far:

  • Joule is an advanced, generative AI copilot.
  • It is embedded into various SAP applications, for example SAP S/4HANA, SAP SuccessFactors etc.
  • Users ask their queries in the natively integrated Joule client embedded in SAP cloud solutions, such as S/4HANA, SuccessFactors etc. 
  • Joule analyses the prompt, provides a much richer query to the LLM, and finally returns a secure, accurate, and appropriate response back to the user.

 

Now, let's understand the architecture of Joule. Below image shows the major components of Joule and it's ecosystem.

 

 

First, some important points to note.

✅Technically, Joule is a service running on SAP BTP in a Cloud Foundry environment.

✅Joule is integrated into SAP cloud solutions, such as S/4HANA, SuccessFactors, SAP Start, SAP Build Work Zone, Ariba, CX and many more.

✅Users can access Joule through a diamond icon in the top right-hand corner of the SAP user interface, regardless of the specific system. 

✅Joule uses SAP Cloud Identity Services for authentication and authorization.

 

Now, let's decode the image shown above.

1️⃣User (say, a manager) enters a prompt in Joule UI, which is embedded inside a SAP cloud solution (e.g. SAP SuccessFactors).

Example - "Show my pending leave requests.”

2️⃣Joule UI forwards the user's request to the Joule service hosted in SAP BTP.

3️⃣As explained in previous post (#2 how Joule works), Joule sends the final prompt to LLM and get a response or instruction to access SAP cloud application.

For example, in this case, Joule recognizes that leave requests are stored in SAP SuccessFactors. So, it needs to retrieve data from SuccessFactors via OData APIs.

4️⃣Joule uses pre-configured Destination in SAP BTP to securely establish the connection with SAP cloud application.

For example, in this case, Joule calls this Destination to access SuccessFactors.

5️⃣ The request flows through the Connectivity Service in SAP BTP. For on-premise system, the Connectivity Service creates a secure tunnel.

6️⃣ Joule calls the OData API to fetch the required data.

For example, in this case Joule makes an OData API request to SuccessFactors and gets pending leave requests for the user.

7️⃣ Joule formats the response and sends it back to Joule UI.

For example, in this case Joule displays:

"You have 3 pending leave requests: 1 from John, 1 from Lisa, and 1 from Mark."

 8️⃣ If the user wants to navigate to an app, Navigation Target Mapping mechanism of SAP Build Work Zone is used.

For example, if user requests, Joule may use Navigation Target Mapping to open the leave approval page in SuccessFactors.

 9️⃣ Throughout the process, security is handled by SAP Cloud Identity Services.

Identity Authentication verifies the user before allowing Joule access.

Identity Provisioning ensures the user has the correct permissions in Joule and SuccessFactors.

 

This is in nutshell - The Architecture of Joule!

 

Stay tuned for Blog #4 Joule Interaction Patterns. Meanwhile, you may read the blog Joule, SAP’s Generative AI Copilot

entry.title: Re: Change Story filter programmatically
entry.content:
Hi,

Yes this is possible. Look at using Application.getFileDataSource().setDimensionFilterWithHierarchy(). Sorry, I don’t have an example handy as I’m away from my laptop. You do need to provide a hierarchy with this method, but you can supply Hierarchy.Flat constant (sorry doing this from memory, so check context help for exact detail). 

Cheers, Ivan.

entry.title: Re: How to import currency conversion data from SAP BW/4 to SAC?
entry.content: Have you prepared a query in BW to import from?

entry.title: Re: How to keep warning message at Publish button in plan...
entry.content: One option is to hide the standard publish button, and create a new button object which will call publish API on click. Then you can add what ever message to user in between or you can even automatically execute data action via API before publish.

entry.title: Re: Graduate Student Programs for SAP Certification - See...
entry.content:
Hi Kavyasri

There are initiatives, if you search for SAP University Alliance you find the below:

https://www.sap.com/belgie/about/company/innovation/next-gen-innovation-platform/university-alliances.html 

The link goes to my country so you might be better off going through Google.

If you search for SAP Learning Hub for students, you find the below: 

https://learning.sap.com/students 

I see that page even includes a link to career options as well. It looks like you can be eligible as a student for a free certification.

We have a Whatsapp group with SAP Champions and SAP Mentors where the below URL was also shared:

CERS01 - SAP Certification Exam, One Attempt for Students | SAP Training

If Udemy offers a set of additional questions for the certification exam you are about to take, it can be worthwhile since it’s low budget and it is a trusted site / resource.

I completed my first certification within the first half year that I started working in the SAP ecosystem as a junior. I started straight from school without any prior SAP knowledge. I started studying course material while I went on vacation to Tunis with a bunch of relatives. I was by the poolside with heaps of papers learning SAP courses. I certified a rather large certificate back then that had many SAP courses included in it for SAP Netweaver Administration including Oracle database administration. I passed it on the first attempt, it wasn’t particularly easy though because it was multiple choice based and sometimes the questions could be tricky in terms of answers being closely related and only slightly different. 

As a newcomer / junior it did give me an edge compared to others because the customers would at least know that I had a good amount of theoretical knowledge. I was also lucky to end of starting in a large team where I could learn from everybody.

I used to start extremely early, somewhere between 5 and 6AM and I used to stay late to learn from anyone in the team. If they had special operations to be done after working hours, I would ask them if I could stick around and to watch with them and learn. 

I was able to progress quickly. I did give management some concerns about potentially burning out but it never happened. 

Good mentors can definitely help you to progress faster. A team and the right project can have a similar effect, you can have a large influence yourself in terms of mindset, attitude, willingness to learn, taking small steps to grow and thrive, taking initiative to propose pro-actively to a customer or a project what can be of interest to them. Interesting work can come your way due to your own initiatives. 

Books can also help you to grow, get ideas, get an edge, I’m fond of reading business books and I believe they have helped me on my journey. I started with Purple Cow from Seth Godin after having the feeling I was stuck in my role as expert consultant.

 

The ideas that came out of reading that book leaded me to becoming a very active SAP Community Member. That led to becoming a SAP Mentor a couple of years later. That led to an enormous growth path. All of the above led to starting my own company, then starting a second company. Ever since I have been thriving and I still wake up early and stop late. I still have the passion I found in the beginning to solve complex issues using technology.

Another recommended read would be “the power of pull”. It discusses why community is important and how sharing and learning can make you thrive. So my suggestion would also be to share knowledge to the community. Blog about aspects you’ve learned. Aim for sharing interesting (new) content. Share your thoughts; potentially on how it could be further improved or what was challenging. Through comments and connections you should notice that you’ll learn in addition to what you already learned. You’ll also notice you will go into more depth if you write about it because you don’t want to write information that is wrong to start with. 

One last piece of advice is learn to use AI. It is here to stay and it going to be everywhere in the future. You want to start today already with building up knowledge and knowing how to leverage it. 

Prompting chatgpt for example:

im a student who has learned to develop sap abap coding. I want to certify and find work in this space, what are your recommendations for my next steps?

Luckily the answer is not yet as profound as mine haha but it can help to find additional sources of information. The AI will probably pick up this comment in the future 😉

Hope this helps.

Best regards

Tom

entry.title: Prevent blocked suppliers to submit bid response in supplier discovery
entry.content:
Hi Ariba Experts, 

Just wanted to check with you on Supplier business network standard working model for blocked vendor.

Our scenario is, we have blocked a particular supplier and expected them not to submit the bid response for our public sourcing event from Ariba. But we have heard that we cannot do any enhancement in supplier discovery. So how do we handle this scenario. Any workarounds for stopping blocked supplier to submit the bids for the event. Kindly help with your expertise.

Thank you! 

Regards,

Rani.

entry.title: Do not allow to do the Putaway for the HU , if the GR is not done

This has to be done for a particular one warehouse and that too for production HU. Procurement from supplier process should remain unaffected.

I have tried using the HU User status and it works fine . But customer is looking for any other alternative solution.

Appreciate , if you can help

Thanks 

Sanjay

entry.title: Re: Volunteering and the Importance of Giving Back
entry.content:
Dear @KatherineKenneally ,

I wanted to express my appreciation for your insightful post on the importance of giving back through volunteering. Your reflections resonate deeply, highlighting how acts of service not only benefit communities but also enrich our own lives. Your dedication to fostering a culture of empathy and community engagement within the SAP Community is truly inspiring. Thank you for shedding light on this vital topic and encouraging us all to contribute positively to society.

Warm regards,

Harish Vatsa

entry.title: Re: The file " is not open, error in source sysem
entry.content: When you run manually it's working and with PC not working means, you could try changing the process chain execution user from system user to your ID and try. Here is how you can change user for execution in PC. Open PC in RSPC, goto menu options Process Chain -> Attributes -> Execution User -> Special User (give your ID) and activate.

entry.title: Convert a Smart Table Column Data to clickable actions in Fiori Elements Custom Card
entry.content:
HI,

I have a custom card in SAP FIORI Overview page . 

Card has a smart table with columns rendered via CDS view where in one of the column i need to convert the text to clickable actions.

My data from CDS looks like "Google,SAP" or "SAP" .

How can i convert these data to clickable actions .

My table extension code looks like below 

  onInit:function{
oSmartTable = this.getView().byId('LineItemsSmartTable');
                    oSmartTable.attachBeforeRebindTable(this.extendColumn.bind(this));
}
extentColumn:function(){
const oMultiStatusColumn = aColumns.find((col) => col.getLabel().getText() === "MultiStatusColumn");
var oMultiStatusColumnTemplate = new sap.m.HBox({
                        items: {
                            path: "MultiStatusColumn",
                            formatter: this.formatLinks.bind(this)
                        }
                    });
                 oMultiStatusColumn.setTemplate(oMultiStatusColumnTemplate);
}
formatLinks: function (sValue) {
                    if (!sValue) return [];
                    var aValues = sValue.split(", "); 
                    return aValues.map(function (sText) {
                        return new sap.m.Link({
                            text: sText,
                            press: function () {
                                sap.m.URLHelper.redirect(sText, true); 
                            }
                        });
                    });
                }
}

 This code throws either a missing template error or a List Binding error .

Any Suggestions or workaround for this scenario @pmuessig @Edrilan_Berisha 

Thanks,

Abhi

Failed Operation
Start
On Step
Create VMs
Cloud Provider
Google Cloud Platform
Message
{ "errors": [ { "code": "QUOTA_EXCEEDED", "errorDetails": [ { "quotaInfo": { "dimensions": { "global": "global" }, "limit": 32.0, "limitName": "CPUS-ALL-REGIONS-per-project", "metricName": "compute.googleapis.com/cpus_all_regions" } } ], "message": "Quota 'CPUS_ALL_REGIONS' exceeded. Limit: 32.0 globally." } ] }

entry.title: Re: Subject : My requirement is Excel file upload in Buil...
entry.content:
Hi,

On the UI side: -

1) File upload component: link

2) Table/List: to show the Excel data before uploading

Then in the controller for reading Order details data:
1) Use a library like 'SheetJS' to read and convert the Excel data.

onUpload: function (oEvent) {
            var oFileUploader = oEvent.getSource();
            var oFile = oFileUploader.oFileUpload.files[0];  // Get the uploaded file

            if (!oFile) {
                sap.m.MessageToast.show("Please upload an Excel file!");
                return;
            }

            var reader = new FileReader();
            var that = this;

            reader.onload = function (e) {
                var data = e.target.result;
                
                // Read workbook
                var workbook = XLSX.read(data, { type: 'binary' });

                // Get first sheet name
                var sheetName = workbook.SheetNames[0];

                // Convert sheet to JSON
                var sheetData = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json(workbook.Sheets[sheetName]);

                // Set the parsed JSON to the model
                that.getView().getModel().setData({ excelData: sheetData });
                that.getView().getModel().refresh();
            };

            // Read file as binary string
            reader.readAsBinaryString(oFile);
        }

Plese remember to place xlsx.js in Your Project(webapp/libs/)

For the API part, please see some reference, link

Thanks,

Jakes

entry.title: Re: Multiple lines in story report for compensation
entry.content:
Hi @ishaqyousuf,

I am facing the same issue right now. Did you find a solution for that?

entry.title: Re: Question about user locked
entry.content:
Dear Guido,

This Temporary Locked - Error is faced due to Throttling.

3 consecutive wrong password attempts will result in throttling.

Throttling is added after 3rd unsuccessful login attempt for given IP address and principal and is valid for 60seconds.
So if within these 60seconds they try again it will fail again.

Hence, when you face this Temporary Locked Error due to unsuccessful authentication - please wait for some minutes & later try with correct credentials. 

Hope this helps!

Thanks

Shubham

entry.title: Re: Connection from BTP ABAP System to PostgreSQL DB via...
entry.content:
I dont think it is possible to connect any DB in SAP BTP ABAP with ODBC connection. You can though consume any DB indirectly in SAP BTP ABAP by exposing it via REST APIs. i.e. build REST APIS in Java/python over the DB and then use these REST APIS in SAP BTP ABAP. 

Regards

Vishal Kapoor

entry.title: Re: can we close OSS opened from 2023 and 2024
entry.content: Please refer to KBA 1239839 - How to Close a Support Case - SAP for Me to close these cases accordingly

entry.title: Re: Table contents shifting on next page in smartforms
entry.content:
Hello All, 

I found the solution, if I mention the minimum height of the table, then all the contents of the table will be only printed when there is enough space (as much as minimum height provided) on page. Hence, all contents of table will be displayed together only.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Sale and leaseback process
entry.content:
Hi,

OSS Note 2662137 point “2. What kind of support is available for mapping the sale and lease back?” describe what is supported in SAP and what not related to this process. 

To set the RoU value you should create a condition having condition purpose = “one time statistical posting”. Assign to it “Condition Valuation Property” = F-Net worth value specified”. 

Dan

entry.title: Re: Notification types in SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello @hamza07 

For phase based maintenance we have two notification types Y1 &Y2. With the current SAP S/4HANA cloud public edition, it is not yet possible to create custom notification types.

Yes default notification type is Y1 but you can adapt UI for app Create Maintenance Request to have the notification type field in the screen where you can choose the notification type while creating the maintenance request.

Hope this is helpful.

BR,

Vijayalaxmi Melavanki

entry.title: Re: Graduate Student Programs for SAP Certification - See...
entry.content:
Hi Kavyasri,

It's recommended to consult your university's office (where you are pursuing Masters) and explore SAP's official channels(tie-ups) for the most current information on available programs.

Yes, SAP Certified Associate - Back-End Developer - ABAP Cloud and SAP Certified Associate - SAP Fiori Application Developer certifications can significantly enhance your credentials in SAP.

Discount on Certification: SAP offers the CERS01 - One SAP Certification Exam for Students, providing a discounted exam attempt for current students and instructors of higher academic institutions. Eligibility requires submission of a valid matriculation document. link

And like Tom had mentioned above, Learning Hub offers great start on lot of recent offerings (combined with developer tutorials, link)

Also, here at SCN, practice questions and study tips are available.

For the feedback on experience, please see the related postings on some networking platforms, example

Thanks,

Jakes

entry.content: Same issue

I can only use Substitute with Content

○What I want to do
I want the profit center of the details at the time of order to be "Sales office code + item profit center"

Please let me know the following:
1. Can it be used depending on how it's used?
2. How to use it
3. Is it scheduled to be released in the future?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Filter query not working after setting target specifi...
entry.content:
In our case also search functionality is working fine for ListPicker but it is case sensitive. We want it to be case insensitive.
i.e irrespective of characters entered (lowercase or uppercase) search result should get populated.

entry.title: Re: How to have different welcome emails for Onboarding i...
entry.content:
Hello William!

We had the same requirement to seperate the emails based on the Legal Entity. However just like you we couldn't based on the Legal Entity.

The workaround for us was to separete it based on the division attribute, so we had to add all the divisions in the IPS tranformation one of the Legal Entitys. The condition looks like the following for exsample: ($.division == 'XY') || ($.division == 'XY') etc..

You have to do it only one of the Legal Entitys because if the condition above is false the other one will run and a different email will be sent to the onboardee.

Let me know if this helped.

 

Best Regards,
Soma

entry.title: Is there any plan to change the version of the SAP Activate exam? There seems still 24_03?

Look forward to hearing from you soon!

Waldemar

entry.title: Can i connect to two different sap s4 hana public cloud tenants in a single sap datasphere tenant?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am setting up a SAP Datasphere system , right now there are 2 source system(S/4 HANA Public Cloud- Dev & Test). S/4 HANA Prod tenant is not yet live. Now the GO live is planned on first week of May, but the organization needs the reports from SAP DSP on Go Live Week itself. So for testing purpose is it prescribed to connect both the Dev & Test system to SAP DSP and configure 2 different space and import the models in between?

The Test Tenant has good data which will help to test out the reports?

 

Thanks in advance.

Regards,

Tanumay.

SAP Datasphere SAP HANA Cloud

entry.title: Test post
Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Hi @yury_sichov 

Had the same problem two weeks ago when installing the new license file. 

My workaround was to manually replace the hardware key from the generated file with the hardware key that the system is expecting (from the error message i.e.)

After this the system accepted the newly generated license.

Florin

Thanks.

entry.title: Error while importing Sample Content PaPM /NXI/P1_IMPORT
entry.content:
Hi everyone.

We have updated PaPM On-Premise to SP23. When I try to download new environments and versions, I get errors:

What could be the problem? The combinations are correct.

entry.title: Re: Filter query not working after setting target specifi...
entry.content:
MDK 24.11 introduced enhanced search capabilities in metadata.  One of those is to set the search Case Sensitivity to true or false.  This simplifies your application to not need a rule to handle this scenario.  Are you using this feature?  If not the What's New details the search enhancements.

From the What's New:

We have enhanced the built-in search to support:

  • Additional Properties: Expands search functionality to include properties that are not directly bound.
  • Case Sensitivity: Enable case-sensitive search support in Offline OData.
  • Contains Search: Supports the use of the contains function in Offline OData V4.
  • Numeric Search: Enhances the MDK Search feature to accommodate numeric properties.

entry.title: Why dont DB02 Current Statements show anything?
entry.content: Why dont DB02 Current Statements show anything?

entry.title: Re: Print for multiple vendors in FBL1N
entry.content: please set the layout without subtotal and save the layout，then the printing will be out continuously
